sources.name: Sample MariaDB
sources.description: Sample database source importing RNA families from the Rfam public database.
sources.query: SELECT rfam_id AS id, description AS title, author AS abstract, rfam_id AS url, created AS publication_date, updated AS modification_date FROM family LIMIT 100

sources.name: Sample PostgreSQL
sources.description: Example PostgreSQL source for importing articles. Update the connection settings before use.
sources.query: SELECT id, title, content AS text, summary AS abstract, author, created_at AS publication_date, updated_at AS modification_date, category AS tags FROM articles
